sections.heading: Scope of application (NPC English text excerpt)
paragraphs: Article 2 This Law shall apply to the offer and trading of shares, corporate bonds, depositary receipts and other securities legally recognized by the State Council within the territory of the People's Republic of China; where this Law contains no provision, the provisions of the Company Law of the People's Republic of China and other laws and administrative regulations shall apply.

sections.heading: Version note
paragraphs: The law was revised on 28 December 2019 and entered into force on 1 March 2020.
